# Pull Request

## What does this change?

One paragraph. What and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] New paper example
- [ ] Correction (broken link, factual error, outdated rule)
- [ ] New chapter or section
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Tone/clarity edit to existing content
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [STYLE.md](../STYLE.md).
- [ ] If this adds a paper example, the paper is real, peer-reviewed, and I have read it.
- [ ] All new links resolve.
- [ ] If I added a paper to a chapter at the five-example cap, I argued for which one to swap.
- [ ] Tone matches the rest of the guide (no AI-style enumerated bullets, no hedge-stacks, no buzzwords).
- [ ] If this is a translation, I translated the whole guide (not a partial).

## Related issue

Closes #<issue-number> (if applicable).
